title: Finding min and max by scanning uses 2n comparisons
statement_informal: The naive simultaneous min-and-max scan uses exactly 2n comparisons.

cost_model.notes: Two comparisons (vs running min and vs running max) per element.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 3 §5.3.3 — selection; the 3n/2 optimum is a harder unit.
